sidebar.brandSubtitle: A team-building experiment for narrowing who to talk to first
sidebar.footer: The current work is refining the problem framing, profile intake, and recommendation flow.

home.heading: A community app for ASM17 pre-team-building discovery
home.description: Chat links alone are not enough, so this helps people review GitHub and intro links based on information from others who interviewed together.
home.visibilityNote: Member info is only visible among email accounts approved as 17th-cohort members.

flowSteps.title: Sign up
flowSteps.text: Create an account with email and PIN.

flowSteps.title: 17th-cohort verification
flowSteps.text: Enter approval-related info and move into the verification flow.

flowSteps.title: Add interview info
flowSteps.text: Enter interview date and start time.

flowSteps.title: Connect profile links
flowSteps.text: Add GitHub and self-introduction Notion links.

flowSteps.title: Review people interviewed together
flowSteps.text: Start by looking at GitHub and intro links from people who interviewed together.

flowSteps.title: Decide faster
flowSteps.text: Narrow down who may be worth talking to before team building.

home.featuresSummary: The current scope is easier to scan as working units rather than long descriptions.
home.futureTitle: Features under consideration if enough members join
home.futureSummary: The current focus is pre-team-building discovery. If enough members sign up later, I want to consider expanding into direction-based recommendations and related tools.

dashboard.title: Seoul Applicant Dashboard
dashboard.introLine1: Right now, 500 seats are open based on 4 days x 5 time slots x 5 tracks x 5 people.
dashboard.introLine2: The dashboard board uses five dots per track so people can scan it as quickly as possible.
dashboard.memberMissingBody: No member info has been added yet.
dashboard.checkStorageNote: Check marks are stored in the DB per user. Use them to track who you have already reviewed.
dashboard.apiMemberCheckFailed: Failed to save the checked state.

errors.title: Team-fit explorer
errors.loadFailed: Failed to load the team-fit explorer.
errors.sessionLoadFailed: Failed to load the current session.
errors.profileLoadFailed: Failed to load your team-fit profile.
errors.profileSaveFailed: Failed to save your team-fit profile.
errors.loginRequired: Log in to save your team-fit exploration interview.
errors.step1Incomplete: Please complete every required step-1 field: one problem sentence, all 5 MBTI axes, and 4 SDGs.
errors.step2Incomplete: Please write the step-2 narrative within 800 characters.
errors.mbtiIncomplete: To save MBTI, please select all {{count}} axes.
errors.impactTagsRequireFour: If you choose Sustainable Development Goals, please select all {{count}}.
errors.saveFailed: Something went wrong while saving your profile.
errors.interviewFailed: Failed to load the next interview question.

access.guestTitle: You are in guest preview mode
access.guestBody: You can review the flow before login, but the actual interview can only be saved after signing in.
access.memberTitle: You can save the interview right now
access.memberBody: Once step 1 and step 2 are filled, AI asks 3 follow-up questions and the profile is saved after those answers finish.

stepLock.title: Please complete step 1 first
stepLock.body: You can enter this after filling out every field in step 1.

landing.title: Let's approach team building like a coding test!

hero.title: Who should I talk to first?
hero.description: This is not a recommendation engine that claims to know the answer. It uses problem and collaboration signals to narrow the candidates worth meeting first.

howItWorks.title: Team-fit recommendation algorithm
howItWorks.description: The flow turns your one-line problem, MBTI, SDGs, 800-character prompt, and interview answers into a shortlist of people worth talking to first.
howItWorks.captureBody: We package the one-sentence problem, 5 MBTI axes, 4 SDGs, 800-character prompt, and the initial 3 interview turns into one exploration profile.
howItWorks.embeddingBody: That saved exploration profile becomes an embedding, and vector search or a local fallback retrieves the closest candidates first.
howItWorks.rankingBody: Problem framing, collaboration signals, SDGs, MBTI, and interview context are combined to narrow candidates by similarity and complementarity.
howItWorks.deliveryBody: The recommendation surface is being reattached around the new data model, and it is intended to help you decide who to talk to first rather than declare a final answer.
howItWorks.runtimeBody: Anthropic question generation · OpenAI embeddings or local fallback · pgvector search or in-memory fallback

fields.problemStatement: One sentence for the problem I want to solve as my SoMa project *
fields.problemStatementPlaceholder: Example: Build a structure that helps people design their own lives and growth.
fields.sdgTagsHint: SDGs are the 17 Sustainable Development Goals defined by the UN.
fields.narrativeMarkdownPlaceholder:
## Why do I want to solve this problem?

## What role do I want to take in the team?

## What can I contribute?

## Who do I want to talk with first?

## What collaboration fits me / what do I want to avoid?

interview.title: AI is starting the follow-up interview
interview.description: The system does not generate all 3 questions at once. It reads your latest answer and decides the next question one by one.
interview.followupDescription: AI reads the saved interview and adds just one new question to continue the thread.
interview.answerHint: Short is okay, but make sure your answer reveals what kind of team and conversation you are actually looking for.
interview.initialRule: The profile is saved only after the initial 3-question interview is complete.
interview.followupRule: This answer is appended after the existing interview history.

results.title: Saved team-fit exploration profile
results.description: The initial 3-question interview is complete, so this profile is now in a read-focused saved state.
results.transcriptDescription: The initial 3 turns and every later follow-up question are appended in order.
results.followupPanelBody: Based on the saved profile, AI can add one more question to push the reasoning further.

comingSoon.label: Temporarily hidden
comingSoon.title: Recommendations will be redesigned in the next step
comingSoon.body: This refactor focused first on intake and interview storage. The recommendation buckets and map will return after they are rebuilt around the new data model.

sdgDialog.title: Choose the 4 SDGs you care about most

bucketDescription.similar: People with a close working pattern, pace, and problem orientation.
bucketDescription.complementary: People who may fill different gaps while still sharing a core direction.
bucketDescription.unexpected: People who are farther away but still share enough signal to be worth a look.

empty.profile: No team-fit profile has been saved yet.
empty.recommendations: No recommendations are ready for {{bucket}} yet.
empty.guestPreview: Log in to save your team-fit profile. Recommendations unlock after 17th-cohort approval.
empty.verificationRequired: You can save your team-fit profile now. Recommendations unlock after 17th-cohort approval.
empty.mapHidden: The distance map appears once there are enough active profiles.

map.title: Simple distance map
map.description: This is a light explorer, not a full graph. It places people by similarity and structured-fit score.

profile.title: Current session summary
profile.guestDescription: Before login, there is no saved session to summarize, so this card stays in preview mode. Once you log in, you can save your profile, and recommendations unlock after 17th-cohort approval.

reasonSentence.similar: {{name}} feels especially close to your current team-fit in terms of {{reasons}}.
reasonSentence.complementary: {{name}} could complement your current team well through {{reasons}}.
reasonSentence.unexpected: {{name}} still looks unexpectedly promising because of {{reasons}}.

reasonSentenceFallback.similar: {{name}} was recommended because the overall team-fit signal is strong.
reasonSentenceFallback.complementary: {{name}} was recommended because they may add a useful new balance to your team.
reasonSentenceFallback.unexpected: {{name}} was recommended because there is still an interesting signal worth a closer look.

dashboardBusanPage.title: The Busan dashboard is not ready yet.
dashboardBusanPage.description: Right now, the product priority is to make the Seoul interview dashboard and verification flow solid first.
dashboardBusanPage.subtext: The Busan dashboard route is in place early, but it will stay inactive until the real data structure and ops flow are ready.

error.pageNotLoaded: The requested page could not be loaded.
